## Get ready for the show

Choose fairy wands with various magic effects for your Fairy Pokémon, and train your Fighting Pokémon with a Training Bag to buff their stats permanently. 

## Wear your colors

Use Smeargle's palette to change the theme and colors of the game. 10 themes are available at launch, with more to come in the future!

## Join the party

Discover PAC streamers directly from the main lobby and watch them play live on Twitch!
